title: Sear 16x
description: Fenin's vanilla style 16x resource pack with dark UI & minimal tweaks.
body:
### Fenin's minimal 16x resource pack.

Includes shortened swords, reshaded icons, slight texture fixes, slight sound changes, bushy leaves, a new panorama, music discs by Shir0, kaiji's compact font, an edited version of amongstreality's dark refined UI, and smolldave & stefanj2_'s enchanted covers CIT pack (will require optifine or CIT resewn to view).

And golden helmets are now crowns, duh. _(please don't put trims on them)_

Pack will be updated occasionally, roughly once per major update of the game :)
